A sacred space in surat

A space to slow down and feel like yourself again

Sound healing is a guided experience that helps your nervous system shift from stress into deep rest — through calming vibrations, sound bowls, and meditative sound journeys.

Beginner friendly
No experience needed
Private & guided sessions

30k+

Happy Sleepers Transformed

The Heart of Aeny

A Space to Pause, Heal & Reconnect

Nestled in the heart of Surat, Aeny offers a calming retreat from the demands of modern life. We believe that true wellness begins when the mind slows down and the body feels safe enough to rest.

Through personalized sound healing and holistic wellness experiences, we help individuals release stress, improve sleep, restore emotional balance, and reconnect with their natural rhythm. Every session is guided with care, intention, and a deep understanding of the body's need for rest and renewal.

Whether you seek relief from everyday stress or a deeper connection with yourself, Aeny provides a welcoming space where healing unfolds naturally.

Aeny Zadafiya

An International Sound Healer

The Mind & Heart

If your mind feels tired but life keeps going…

You keep showing up for everyone around you.
Yet inside, your mind feels busy, your body feels tired, and your heart feels heavy.
Sleep doesn't always refresh you.
Quiet moments don't always feel peaceful.
And somewhere along the way, you've forgotten what true calm feels like.
This is your invitation to pause, breathe, and return to yourself.

This is where Sound Healing helps the nervous system gently slow down.

Begin Your Journey

01

Mentally Overwhelmed

Your mind feels constantly active and tired.

02

Emotionally Heavy

You feel emotionally drained or disconnected.

03

Unable to Relax

Even rest doesn’t feel restful anymore.

04

Seeking Peace

You want calmness and emotional balance.

No confusion, just gentle guidance

You Don’t Need to Figure It Out Alone

Many people come to Aeny feeling stressed, emotionally overwhelmed, mentally exhausted, or simply unsure of where to begin. That's completely okay.

Our role is not to overwhelm you with options. We take the time to understand how you're feeling and gently guide you toward the healing experience that best supports your current needs.

Every recommendation is personalized, intuitive, and centered around your emotional well-being.

Start Your Healing
27k+ Happy Sleepers
Understanding Sound

Experience the Healing Power of Sound

Sound healing is a gentle, non-invasive practice that uses soothing vibrations and therapeutic frequencies to help calm your nervous system, quiet mental chatter, and restore emotional balance.

You simply lie down, close your eyes, and let the sounds wash over you.
  • No prior experience needed
  • No special techniques to learn
  • Gentle, safe, and deeply restorative
  • Arrive exactly as you are
  • Just come as you are
◎
27.3K Followers

Follow me on Instagram for creative work, updates, behind-the-scenes content and daily inspiration.

Our Services

Healing Therapies for Mind, Body & Soul

Explore a wide range of holistic healing services at Aeny Healing Studio designed to bring energy balance, emotional clarity, and deep inner peace. Whether you seek transformation, relaxation, or spiritual awakening, we have a therapy to support your journey.

Book Session

A quieter mind

The mental chatter softens. Your thoughts feel less heavy and overwhelming.

Energy Work

Deeper inner rest

A sense of stillness deeper than just physical relaxation.

Movement

Emotional lightness

The weight you carry feels lighter. Things don't feel as heavy.

Inner Work

Easier relaxation

Falling asleep feels natural. Rest becomes truly restful.

Your Journey

The Healing Experience

"Every experience is unique." Your only role is to receive.

Begin Your Journey

You Arrive

In a calm, quiet space designed for deep relaxation.

You Settle

Lie down comfortably and begin to relax.

Sound Guide

Gentle vibrations lead you into deep calm.

Release

Tension melts as you drift inward peacefully.

Return

You emerge feeling lighter and more grounded.

Reconnect With Your Inner Calm Today

Your first session is just one message away. We'd love to welcome you to our space.

What Our Clients Are Saying

At Aeny, we’ve guided hundreds of individuals through personal transformation—helping them release stress, sleep deeply, and reconnect with themselves. Here are some of their stories.

Most Loved Therapy
Reserve Your Spot

Sound Bath Meditation

Deep Sleep Massage

Chakra Balancing

Our clients’ favorite session combining Tibetan bowls and gongs to create deep vibrational healing. Ideal for stress relief, insomnia, and energetic release.

Plan Your Healing Journey

Book a Personalized Sleep & Sound Session

Ready to begin your path toward deep rest and emotional clarity? Booking a session with Aeny is simple and intentional. Whether you’re new to healing or returning for continued support, we’re here to hold space for you with care and presence.

01
Choose Your Therapy

Select from our sound healing, sleep rituals, or custom sessions.

02
Pick a Date & Time

Our calendar offers flexible slots to match your rhythm.

03
Share a Few Details

Tell us what you’re looking for so we can guide you better.

04
Receive Confirmation

We’ll send a gentle reminder and welcome you in a calm setting.

Schedule Your Session
